text: Sensor lights at Rainbow Chowk stay on 24×7; fix timer.
Connaught Place ke middle circle ki public toilet smell kar rahi, flush nahi kaam kar raha.
राजीवनगर भागात अचानक भूकंपसदृश कंपन जाणवले, अभ्यास केला नाही, लोकांनी बाहेर धाव घेतली.
करवा रोडवरील उच्च माध्यमिक शाळेतील वर्ग खिडक्यांना फळी नाही, सापाचा धोक्याचा अंदाज.
Chandan Chowk pe divider ka metal grill ukhad gaya, bike wale gir rahe hain.
Greenfield Tower ka name-board tuta hua, logo ko confusion hota hai address dhundne me.
हिमगिरि कॉलोनी के पहाड़ी ढलानों पर मलबा गिर रहा है, तत्काल बचाव दल भेजें।
आंबेडकरनगर मराठी शाळेच्या संगणक प्रयोगशाळेत वीज गेली ४ दिवस, ऑनलाईन सराव रखडला.
Safdarjung Enclave ki small park mein kachra scattered hai, koi nahi saaf kar raha.
उदय नगर स्कूल की स्मार्ट क्लास रूम में प्रोजेक्टर आधा साल से खराब है, अधिकारी कोई सुध नहीं लेते।
कौतिकनगर टेकडीवर भूस्खलनाची चिन्हे दिसताहेत, रात्रीच्या पावसाने घरे हालचाल करत आहेत.
Missing zebra crossing paint near Lotus School; kids risk lives every day.
अंबर टावर के पास sewage overflow ho raha hai, heavy rain prediction hai, immediate pump lagao warna flood hoga.
The smart boards in Model School Sector 9 haven't worked for three months and exams are next week, please fix!
Heavy truck parked overnight opposite Nilgiris Mall blocks entire lane for ambulances.
Mayapuri Phase-1 ke sabzi market ke paas gutter saaf nahi hua 2 weeks se, overflow ho raha.
Christmas decorations lying uncleared on Snowflake Street for weeks.
বৈশাখী মেলা মাঠে অস্থায়ী ত্রাণ সেন্টার তালা মারা, বন্যার্তরা বাইরে।
Munirka flyover ramp se neeche utarte hi 2 bulbs flicker kar rahe, headache ho jaata hai.
सिद्धेश्वर मार्केट परिसरात पावसाच्या पाण्याने रस्ते बुडाले, दुकानांमध्ये शिरकाव सुरू आहे.
Mosquito breeding in open drains outside Nandini Apartments.
মিরাজ নগর কলেজ ক্যাম্পাসে ওয়াইফাই নেটওয়ার্ক বন্ধ সেমিস্টার জুড়ে, অনলাইন ফর্ম জমা বাকি।
Kalkaji extension ki G-block mein street lights savere 6 baje band ho jaate hain, abhi toh dark hai.
Non-refund of earnest money after withdrawal of tender for Mall Site, need grievance redressal.
Forest fire spreading uphill behind Rose Valley farmhouses, thick smoke visible from NH-22, evacuation route blocked.
Rajouri Garden Block B ke commercial complex ke backside mein huge trash ka dher, kab tak yun rahega?
रामबाग विद्यालय में गणित शिक्षक की कमी है, 90 बच्चे खाली कक्षा में बैठते हैं।
ब्रह्मपुरी slum में अवैध पटाखों की फैक्ट्री fire catch kar sakti hai, disaster drill chahiye aur removal.
Notice served to wrong flat A-302 instead of C-302 in Orchid Heights; cancel immediately.
Request to correct address spelling from ‘Banjara Streer’ to ‘Banjara Street’ in land records.
Midday meal at Saraswati Vidya Mandir served cold and undercooked pulses, 12 students vomited after lunch today.
Unhygienic juice kiosk at Moon Market using dirty water.
No door-to-door pickup in Sector 9 for four days; colonies are littered.
Keshav Vihar main road pe 2 foot ka gaddha kya permanent swimming pool ban gaya?
Mobility scooter promised to wheelchair girl in Rose Park never arrived after last year survey.
Sector 9 ke roundabout pe patchwork ek mahine se adhura, signal jam hota hai roz.
Ashiana Society ke basement me sewage backflow, smell se ghar bandh karna padta.
काटेगांव वस्तीमध्ये जलस्रोताचे पाईप फुटले, पाणी घरांमध्ये शिरतंय, लहान मुले धोक्यात.
Overflowing medical bins near City Clinic; used syringes on ground.
Model Town ke road pe drain ka silt na nikala 6 mahine se.
बालिका विद्यालय, शक्ति एन्क्लेव में drinking water purifier kharab, students borewell ka paani peete hain, health impact ho raha.
Sharma ji ke ghar ke paas ka valve kharab, noise se neend kharab ho rahi.
Please enroll 7-year-old orphan Tina of Olive Lane into midday-meal program at local school.
Breach in Kanjiram Canal embankment near Mahadev Chowk, water gushing into houses—evacuation sirens needed!
Gulmohar Colony ke sabzi market ke baad ke plot mein plastic bottles aur thailiyaan, please koi safai kar do.
Chirag Delhi flyover ke neeche debris bhi hai plastic bhi hai, nigalta ja raha hai road ko.
Netaji Subhash Vihar park mein dog poo har jagah, koi sweeper dikh nahi raha, bahut smell hai.
Old lady in Mangal Basti, House 45B, bedridden and alone, needs monthly ration kit urgently.
Dead rat under food stalls at Sunday Bazaar causing stench.
Bench near Lotus Pond missing slats—can’t sit.
CBSE सिलेबस की किताबें अब तक नहीं आयीं Greenpark branch में, exam sirf 2 mahine door hain, arrange karo.
मनोरमा कॉम्प्लेक्स जवळील शाळेला क्रीडा साहित्य मिळालं नाही, मुलांची वर्गाबाहेरची खेळ थांबली.
Drunk cab driver doing 100 kmph on Bypass stretch near 3rd Mile at 2 am.
Spark in Fusebox on third floor every evening at Galaxy Apartments, please check wiring.
Kirti Nagar central park mein fountain ka motor nahi chal raha, bad smell aa rahi hai.
प्रबुद्धनगर शाळेचा मुख्य प्रवेशद्वार फुटला आहे, सुरक्षिततेच्या कारणास्तव लवकर दुरुस्त करा.
Ranjan Heights ki balcony se chunks gir rahe, neeche koi bache khelte hain.
Garbage heap near Shastri Market transformer looks ready to ignite; urgent clearance needed.
Dog poop all over jogging track at Vista Grove.
Garbage truck leaking liquid waste on Main Street—spray disinfectant.
ट्राइसिटी मॉल की fire exit stairways locked hain, weekend rush hai, tragedy ho sakti hai, unlock karo immediately.
Streetlights off on Palm Avenue since Diwali night, making biking extremely risky.
চকবাজার ছোট মাদ্রাসার লাইব্রেরিতে বই সিলিং থেকে ঝুলছে, স্যাঁতসেঁতে ঘ্রাণ।
सरस्वती कॉलनी मधील नाल्याचे झाकण वरून वाहिले, पावसाच्या तोंडावर डांबर वाहून दुर्घटना घडू शकते.
Slaughterhouse waste scattered behind the mosque, flies everywhere.
Single mother at Flat 901 Sunview Heights lost job, demand gas subsidy and medical aid fast.
Anand Vihar colony ka submersible motor band, borewell pe line lambi.
Ramp being built on public road in front of Sunbeam Complex; remove unauthorized structure.
Krishna Nagar me supply timing change ho gaya bina notice, office jaate sab late.
Buses skip the designated stop outside Metro Plaza, forcing seniors to chase them.
Kirti Complex ke parking me pillar se cement nikal raha, steel dikh raha — dar lagta hai.
Maple Residency ke entrance gate ka motor damaged, speed bump ban gaya khud.
Missing cover on junction box at Emerald Towers gate.
विजयपुर विद्यालय के खेल मैदान में कूड़ा डाला जा रहा है, विद्यार्थियों के लिए खेलना असंभव है।
कालका माता मंदिर के पास पेड़ की डाल टूटी padi hai, high wind alert hai, removal abhi karo.
अनाथाश्रम रोड की कक्षा 8 में smart-board 3 months se band hai, part ka intzaar hai, kab aayega?
श्रीनगर चौक परिसरातील शाळेच्या ग्रंथालयात पुस्तके पडझड झाली आहेत, दुरुस्ती लागते.
जवाहर विहार हाईस्कूल का रिज़ल्ट corridor ka plaster gir raha hai, student ko lag sakta hai, urgent repair karo.
Green Park exit pe sinkhole 1 foot aur faila, kya kabhi repair hoga?
চাঁদপুর লঞ্চঘাটে আলো নেই, ঘন কুয়াশায় সুরক্ষা ঝুঁকি বাড়ছে।
জলাবস্থায় শেখেরটেক নিচু এলাকার মানুষ নিরাপদ শেল্টার না পেয়ে রাস্তায় রাত কাটাচ্ছে।
রেলগেট পাড়া মাধ্যমিক বিদ্যালয়ে ইংরেজি শিক্ষক অনুপস্থিত দুমাস ধরে, পরীক্ষা সামনে।
Duplicate Aadhaar card linkage error keeps deleting Shanti Devi’s ration card from system.
Manual switch on Violet Street broken, lights never turn off.
Footpath lamps near Elite Hospital too dim for elder patients.
Auto-rickshaw stand encroaching onto main road at Bridge Circle during rush hour.
Cow carcass on Riverside Road emitting foul odour since morning.
Scrap picker children near Railway Colony bypass have no winter clothes; distribute blankets.
Streetlights on Pine Avenue flicker after 9 pm, unsafe for joggers.
The girl's toilet at Sunrise Academy, Shivpuri Marg, is blocked and overflowing sewage into the corridor, unbearable stench.
Rajendra Nagar flyover pe railing tuti hui, koi notice bhi nahi — kya kisi ka wait kar rahe ho?
Tughlakabad extension ki main road pe stagnant water hai, malaria case pehle bhi mile the.
হাজারীবাগ ঢালে পাহাড় ধসের আওয়াজ শুনছি, রাতে ঘুম নেই।
Lack of emergency exit signage at new multiplex on Crosscut Avenue, need inspection now.
स्वारगेट फ्लायओव्हरखाली मोठा खड्डा वाढला, अकस्मात वाहन खाली पडण्याची भीती वाढली.
शिवसेनापूर शाळेत पहिलीची गणित वर्गिका आज रिकामी आहे, मास्टर दुपारपर्यंत नाही.
Sector-9 Dwarka ki galli no 3 mein kachron ka dher, aag lagi thi bhi, help please.
Overflowing garbage bins at Maple Lane junction reeking since Friday—please clear today.
मदरसा बस्ती के school में toilets bahut gande, girls periods में absent ho jaati hain, swachhata abhiyaan chahiye.
Khan Market ke rear service lane mein open manhole cover, bachche khel rahe hain, please cover kar do.
सरकारी स्कूल, फतेहपुर की boundary wall tuti hui hai, stray dogs class ke andar aa jaate hain, safety risk hai.
Rotten vegetables stinking at Neeladri Market corner, dispose fast.
SMC द्वारा दिए गए मिड-डे मील में से cockroach nikla, बच्चे बीमार ho rahe hain, koi check karo.
Malviya Nagar ke Shahpur Jat side ke road pe drainage overflow, bad smell, residents pareshan.
শ্যামলী আবাসিক এলাকার সরকারি প্রাথমিক বিদ্যালয়ে মাঝরাতে ডাস্টবিন আগলে শূন্য।
শিববাড়ি সরকারি প্রাথমিক বিদ্যালয়ের চালে ফাঁস, বৃষ্টিতে ক্লাসে পানি পড়ে।
Sub-letting shop in Sapphire Arcade violating lease deed; initiate action.
Dangerous loose wires dangling near Lamp 27B on Riverbank Road.
Flash flood trapped 20+ villagers on roof tops, Kaveripuram lower streets—boats and ropes needed urgently!
আমবাগান কলোনিতে কালবৈশাখীর পর বৈদ্যুতিক তার ছিঁড়ে পড়ে আছে, যে কোনো মুহূর্তে দুর্ঘটনা।
Lamp post #42 opposite Lotus Park fused for a week.
Sunrise Apartments ke STP se noise aur smell, balcony use karna band.
Green Valley flats me overhead tank ka overflow roz, paani ka hisaab kya hai?
Sprinkler heads broken in Cedar Circle, creating muddy puddles.
Stray pig near Krishna Nagar school suspected of carrying disease, remove urgently.
ভোরকুঞ্জ উচ্চ বিদ্যালয়ে একাদশ শ্রেণির ছাত্রছাত্রীদের নোটবই নেই, রীতিমতো ক্লাস ফাঁকা।
सतपुरा पहाड़ के नीचे भूस्खलन हो गया, ज़मीन हिल रही है, तुरंत इलाका खाली करवाएँ।
উত্তর বারিধারা উচ্চ বিদ্যালয়ের প্রধান শিক্ষক অফিসে তালা, নতুন টিসি দরকার।
Dry palm fronds hanging near electric cables on Surya Street, very close to spark zone.
Food poisoning outbreak at night shelter on Ridge Road; send medical team and hygiene kits.
Elder man outside Temple Gate, Krishna Nagar, needs cataract surgery referral letter.
Rohini Sector 5 me murky paani aata hai, filter bhi haar gaya.
Chemistry lab lacks fume hood in Adarsh Nagar Govt School; fumes give students headaches during practicals.
Sarita Vihar Block D ka drain cover toot gaya, koi gir sakta hai, khatra hai.
Greater Kailash M-block market ke circle ke 4 lights mein 2 fused, please thik kar do warna snatchers active hain.
Delay of three months in disbursing scholarship for girl students of Nirmal Nagar High School.
अंकुर स्कूल के छत से सीलन टपक रही है, बरसात में कक्षाएँ बंद करनी पड़ती हैं।
शांति नगर की प्राथमिक विद्यालय में बच्चों के बैठने की कुर्सियाँ टूटी हुई हैं, आज ही नयी क्यों नहीं आतीं?
सेठी प्लाज़ा की basement parking में 2-feet paani bhar gaya, pump bhej do warna car float ho jayengi.
There’s no access road for fire tenders to enter Jasmine Society due to parked cars.
Roses bed destroyed by picnickers near Tulip Plaza; need fencing.
दत्तनगर गर्दीवसरीत पेट्रोल पंपाजवळ गरमीने स्फोट होण्याची शक्यता, वातावरण तापलं आहे.
प्राइमरी स्कूल, कृष्णा नगर में टीचर ही नहीं आते, बच्चे पूरी क्लास खाली बैठे hain, please action lo.
Rajni Plaza ke staircase railing loose ho gayi, pakadke bhi darr lagta hai.
No English teacher assigned to Class 10 at Greenfield High since Mrs Rawat resigned in January—Syllabus lagging!
Traffic jam from 7–9 am on Blue Ridge Road due to school vans double-parking.
Old Rajinder Nagar mein naala overflow ho raha hai, mosquitoes ka swarn problem, dengue ka dar hai.
चेतना स्कूल की छत पर हल्का भूकंप के झटके महसूस हुए, बच्चों की सुरक्षा जाँचें।
Kaveri Street pe jo supply line burst hui, 3 din se swimming pool road pe.
Lakshmi Road pe zebra crossing ka paint fade ho gaya, school bachhe confuse ho rahe.
Amrapali Mall me fire-exit ka board to laga hai par door nahi dikh raha koi.
Bags dumped opposite Skyview Apartments, pests swarming. Action needed urgently.
AIIMS ke paas wale public toilet choked hai, paani safed nikal raha, please urgently check.
Shalimar Bagh DLF mall ke peeche wale small park mein plants dry hain, drip system leak lag rahi hai.
Palam sabzi mandi ke piche laal building ke niche kachra mountain jaise ho gaye, karte kyun nahi?
Sector 14 Gurgaon ke Huda park ke paas walk-way lights 3 din se off, morning walk karna mushkil hai.
Overgrown shrubs block visibility at left turn to Lakeview Colony; trimming needed urgently.
Vasant Kunj ke park ka drinking fountain khali, joggers pareshan hain.
Playground swings broken in Sunflower Park, toddlers can’t use them.
Earthquake just rattled East Ridge Colony, several 6-storey buildings tilted, people screaming outside—send rescue team fast!
Preet Vihar central park mein benches sab tooti hui, koi baith nahi sakta, please repair karo.
ITO Metro station ki exit B ke side footpath pe kachra jam ho gaya hai, badbu aa rahi hai.
सानेगुरुजी कॉलनी शाळेमध्ये पिण्याच्या पाण्याची फिल्टर बंद पडली, विद्यार्थ्यांना वागवा आहे.
My mutation for Flat 405, Rainbow Residency, stuck for six months; need update.
दिल्ली-सहारनपुर हाईवे underpass में petrol tanker overturn ho gaya, HAZMAT team bhejo abhi abhi.
मानसून अलर्ट ke baad bhi झील एन्क्लेव की drain covers missing hain, small kids doob sakte hain, cover lagao.
Sector 11 ke apartment ka sewage pipe rupture ho gaya, wall damp ho rahi.
Sudden 40 % hike in property tax notice for Ocean View Villas, please verify calculation.
Digital attendance app ka server down hai, teacher manual register bharte hain, precious time waste ho raha hai, server restore karo.
New LED lamps in Rose Garden not working half nights.
Smoke belching from basement of Emerald Mall; security says it’s junk burning, smells toxic.
Fire hydrant at Rajendra Nagar Park gate broken, gushing water since noon, needs fixing.
Green Park extension ka garden lights fused hain, evening mein dar lagta hai.
Basant Avenue ka pipeline leak 2 weeks se, road paani paani ho rakhi.
कृष्णा पार्क के विद्यालय की चहारदीवारी पर बिजली का तार टूटा हुआ है, छूते ही करंट लग सकता है।
Hari Nagar park ka fountain band hai aur grass lambi ho gayi, bachche khel nahi paate.
Rani Bagh ke main drain pe cover toota, kal ka baccha girne wala tha.
নূরপুর গ্রামে কুয়াশা কাটার মেশিন অজানা কারণে বন্ধ, বীজতলা নষ্ট হচ্ছে।
तूफान के बाद शक्ति नगर की बिजली अभी तक बहाल नहीं हुई, हॉस्पिटल में जनरेटर खत्म हो गया।
Widower with disability card at Lotus Tower Block-D unable to collect pension as lift is broken.
খিলগাঁও উড়াল সেতুর নিচে জমা বৃষ্টির পানি বাড়ছে, পানিবন্দি।
त्रिवेणी घाट पर अचानक धरती में दरार आई है, रास्ता बंद हो गया है।
Open drain dug on my boundary at Tulip Enclave is damaging foundation wall.
Surya Enclave ke common toilet ka roof leak, paani meter room me ja raha.
Sewage manhole cover broken in Sapphire Colony, kids playing nearby.
सूर्य विहार की प्राथमिक शाला में लाइब्रेरी का ताला लटका है, किताबें धूल में सड़ रही हैं।
प्रभाग १२ मधील प्राथमिक शाळेचे शौचालय जवळपास ३ दिवसांपासून बंद, मुलं घरी जावं लागतं.
Vasant Kunj pocket 3 ka jogging track pe kichar hai after rains, please drainage fix kar do.
Noida ka Shahdara drain kal se overflow, malaria season ahead soch ke dar lagta.
Pearl Tower ke terrace pe illegal grill chadha diya, building lean lag rahi.
Library books worth ₹50k missing from Bluebell International, audit next month, need urgent inspection.
Vikas Marg ke nale ki grill missing, plastic choked.
Rohini Pocket 7 mein pole no 18 ke wire tang ho gaye, light off hai, khatra hai.
Gandhi Gali ka naala overflow kar raha, fragrance puchho mat!
Lake View Complex ka basement drain se paani bhara, parking ki cars half submerged abhi bhi.
কাজীপাড়া বালিকা বিদ্যালয়ে বিজ্ঞান ল্যাবরেটরির গ্যাস লিকছে, গন্ধ চারদিকে।
Request speed-breakers on Sunflower Lane where two accidents happened last week.
Heatwave warning: No water tanker reached Old Bazaar slum in 4 days, children fainting on streets, quick relief.
Flashing strobe bulb at Nova Cinema entrance causing seizures—needs change.
अनंतनगर नाक्याजवळील इंग्लिश माध्यम शाळेतील शिक्षकांचं वेतन 2 महिने थांबलं, तणाव वाढतोय.
Gale wind snapped electric wires on Banyan Street, live wires dangerously close to parked school vans, evacuate kids.
Overgrown shrubs hiding snakes on Ridge Walk path.
